message:
feat(html-export): expand CSS utility classes for richer layouts

Add missing Tailwind-style utility classes to support more flexible
HTML export layouts:

Display utilities:
- .block, .inline-flex, .hidden for display control

Spacing:
- .gap-1 (0.25rem) for tighter flex gaps
- .px-1.5, .py-0.5 for compact padding

Text truncation:
- .line-clamp-3 using -webkit-line-clamp for multi-line ellipsis

Details/Summary:
- Rename section "Lists" → "Lists & Details"
- Add group-open:hidden for collapsible content patterns
- Style details[open] state for accordion-style components

These utilities enable more compact, interactive HTML exports with
proper text overflow handling and expandable sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
